title: Eddington Luminosity

expressions.name: Eddington luminosity
expressions.expression: 4 pi G M c m_p / sigma_T in erg/s
expressions.latex: L_{\rm Edd} = \frac{4\pi G M c m_p}{\sigma_T}

expressions.name: Eddington accretion rate
expressions.expression: 4 pi G M m_p / (0.1 sigma_T c)

body:
The Eddington luminosity is the maximum luminosity a star can have
while maintaining hydrostatic equilibrium.

title: Escape Velocity

expressions.name: Escape velocity
expressions.expression: sqrt(2 G M / R) in km/s

expressions.name: Circular velocity
expressions.description: Circular orbital velocity, 1/√2 times escape velocity

body:
The escape velocity is the minimum speed needed for an object to escape
the gravitational influence of a massive body.

title: Kepler's Third Law

expressions.name: Orbital period
expressions.expression: P = sqrt(4 pi^2 a^3 / (G M)), P in yr

expressions.name: Orbital separation from period
expressions.expression:
P = sqrt(4 pi^2 a^3 / (G M)),
 d = (G M P^2 / (4 pi^2))^(1/3), d in au
expressions.description: Given period P, compute semi-major axis

body: Kepler's Third Law relates orbital period to semi-major axis for two-body systems.

title: Schwarzschild Radius

expressions.name: Schwarzschild density
expressions.latex: \rho_s = \frac{3c^6}{32\pi G^3 M^2}, \rho_s = \frac{3c^6}{32\pi G^3 M^2}, \rho_s = \frac{3c^6}{32\pi G^3 M^2}, \rho_s = \frac{3c^6}{32\pi G^3 M^2}, \rho_s = \frac{3c^6}{32\pi G^3 M^2}
expressions.description: Average density within the event horizon

body: The Schwarzschild radius defines the event horizon of a non-rotating black hole.
